meaning: adv.扈丞ｸｸ蝨ｨ荳句壕蜿醍函,豈丞､ｩ荳句壕
examples: She studies art two afternoons a week.
She toddles down to the park most afternoons.
Afternoons are spent on game drives and tracking hikes to see cheetahs, leopards and hyenas.
On winter afternoons, hot chocolate is on offer, along with a delicious assortment of pastries.
